nasb.text: he lends money on interest and takes increase; will he live? He will not live! He has committed all these abominations, he will surely be put to death; his blood will be on his own head.

esv.text: lends at interest, and takes profit; shall he then live? He shall not live. He has done all these abominations; he shall surely die; his blood shall be upon himself.

cnv.text: 他借東西給人要收利息，也向人多要，這樣的人能存活嗎？他必不能存活；他行了這一切可憎的事，必要滅亡；他的罪要歸到他身上。

ccb.text: 放债取利，这样的人还能活着吗？他必不能活。他作恶多端，必自取灭亡，抵偿自己的血债。
